basic_details.job_title: NMDC Apprentice Recruitment 2026 Notification Out – Walk in for 180 Trade, Graduate, Technician Apprentice Posts
basic_details.short_information: NMDC Apprentice Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 180 vacancies across Chhattisgarh's Dantewada. Candidates with B.Tech/B.E, Diploma, ITI Can attend the walkin. The Walk-in starts from 01-06-2026, and ends on 11-06-2026. For detailed information please visit NMDC official website, nmdc.co.in.
basic_details.organization_name: Training, Safety & Environment Dept., Bailadila Iron Ore Mine, Bacheli Complex
basic_details.post_name: Trade Apprentice, Graduate Apprentice, Technician Apprentice

age_limit.age_details: Walk-in Interview at Training Institute, BIOM, Bacheli Complex

how_to_apply: Candidates must attend the walk-in interview on the date mentioned against their respective category at the Training Institute, BIOM, Bacheli Complex, Bacheli. There is no online application form to be submitted on the NMDC website. Prior registration on the respective portal is mandatory before attending the walk-in interview - Trade Apprentice candidates must register at www.apprenticeshipindia.org and Graduate / Technician Apprentice candidates must register at https://nats.education.gov.in before the walk-in interview date.
seo_tags: National Mineral Development Corporation Apprentice Recruitment 2026
